description_long: This object is a modern rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a fixed stock and a prominent carrying handle integrated into the upper receiver. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a metallic flash hider. The handguard and stock are both solid and robust, likely made from a durable polymer or composite material. The trigger and pistol grip are clearly defined, with the magazine area appearing flush and not protruding. Iron sights are visible, with the front sight post mounted near the muzzle and the rear sight integrated into the carrying handle.
description: A matte black rifle with a fixed stock, carrying handle, and long barrel ending in a flash hider. Features iron sights and a robust, streamlined design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, carrying handle, and long barrel with flash hider.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow profile of the barrel and the front sight post.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the stock, grip, and barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the width of the stock and the alignment of the carrying handle and rear sight.
